description: This file defines a centralized API exception handler for a Spring Boot application, managing different types of exceptions and returning structured JSON error responses.
external_methods: err instanceof FieldError fe ? fe.getField() : err.getObjectName()

classes.name: ApiExceptionHandler
classes.description: A controller advice class that handles various exceptions across the API, returning JSON-formatted error responses.

methods.name: handleBadRequest
methods.description: Handles IllegalArgumentException, returns a 400 BAD REQUEST with error details.

methods.name: handleValidation
methods.description: Handles validation errors from MethodArgumentNotValidException, returns a 400 BAD REQUEST with detailed validation errors.

methods.name: handleBadJson
methods.description: Handles bad JSON syntax errors, returns a 400 BAD REQUEST indicating malformed JSON.

methods.name: handleServerError
methods.description: Handles IllegalStateException, returns a 500 INTERNAL SERVER ERROR.

calls: err instanceof FieldError fe ? fe.getField() : err.getObjectName()
